name: main.go
purpose: Entry point: parses Claude Code's statusline JSON from stdin, loads config, builds widgets, renders 3-line output, then refreshes API caches.
notes: Contains StdinData schema struct (FlexModel handles string vs object model field — dual format for CC >=2.1.89 vs older). Windows UTF-8 chcp.com call at startup. Config discovery walks exe dir then cwd.

name: config.go
purpose: Defines all config structs and loadConfig() which merges config.toml then config.local.toml on top.
notes: Two-file config merge pattern: shared (git-tracked) + local (gitignored, machine-specific). APIKeysConfig holds weather_api_key; PathsConfig holds binary_dir override. defaultConfig() provides safe baseline so binary works with zero config files.

name: render.go
purpose: Assembles 16 widgets into 3 labeled lines, applies ANSI reset prefix and non-breaking space substitution per ccstatusline pattern, writes to stdout.
notes: Line layout is hardcoded: L1=identity+context, L2=health+metrics, L3=lifestyle+session. colorize() and joinWidgets() are pure formatting helpers. prepareLine() replaces ASCII space with U+00A0 to prevent Claude Code terminal trimming.

name: widgets.go
purpose: Implements all 16 widget functions across four categories: stdin-only, git branch (cached shell-out), file-read (todo task), and API-backed (weather/PR/CI from cache files).
external_refs: gh (pr view, run list via cache.go)
notes: sanitize() strips ANSI/control chars with compiled regexes (csiRe, oscRe). widgetCurrentTask reads ~/.claude/todos/<session>-agent-*.json with path traversal guard. git branch cached 5s in-process. ANSI color constants all 16-color except one 256-color orange for context orange threshold.

name: cache.go
purpose: Manages per-binary cache files (~/.claude/statusline/cache-jason-os/) for weather, GitHub PR, and CI data; implements exponential backoff on fetch failures.
notes: Cache dir is ~/.claude/statusline/cache-jason-os/ — deliberately isolated from SoNash sibling (cache-sonash or similar) to prevent PR/CI/weather cross-contamination. BackoffState with per-source BackoffEntry. On PR/CI fetch failure, cache file is removed (not left stale). fetchDailyForecast is best-effort addendum to fetchWeather.

name: statusline_test.go
purpose: Go test suite covering config loading, stdin parsing, all stdin-only widgets, sanitize(), rendering helpers, cache staleness, and widget join logic.
notes: 19 test functions. Uses t.TempDir() for config tests. Tests cover nil pointer paths (UsedPercentage optional), dual-format FlexModel, color thresholds (green/yellow/orange/blink-red), empty widget skipping in joinWidgets. No API/network mocking — API widget tests limited to placeholder behavior.

name: go.mod
purpose: Go module definition: module name jason-statusline, requires Go 1.26.1, single external dependency github.com/BurntSushi/toml v1.6.0.
notes: Module name 'jason-statusline' is JASON-OS-specific. Only one third-party dep (BurntSushi/toml). All other imports are Go stdlib. go 1.26.1 directive is forward — pinned to dev machine Go version.

name: go.sum
purpose: Go module checksum file locking BurntSushi/toml v1.6.0 hash for reproducible builds.
notes: Two lines (source + go.mod hash). Committed alongside go.mod for reproducibility. No other transitive deps.

name: build.sh
purpose: Cross-platform build script: runs go test, compiles binary for current GOOS/GOARCH, installs to ~/.claude/statusline/, copies configs, and runs a smoke-test render.
notes: Handles Windows HOME/USERPROFILE/cygpath edge case. Adds .exe suffix on Windows. Uses -a flag (force full rebuild) to avoid Go build cache staleness. Installs both config.toml and config.local.toml to install dir. Smoke test pipes sample JSON to installed binary. Outputs '16 widgets / 3 lines' summary. Binary name: jason-statusline-v2(.exe).

name: config.toml
purpose: Shared, git-tracked configuration: separator, line count, color mode, weather location/units/TTL, timezone, color thresholds, cache behavior, and display placeholders.
notes: Location and timezone are Nashville/America/Chicago (user-specific defaults). Units=imperial. These values are shared defaults — any user cloning JASON-OS gets Nashville weather until they override in config.local.toml. Needs sanitization note for SoNash mirror: location/timezone may differ.

name: config.local.toml.example
purpose: Template for machine-local overrides: instructs user to copy to config.local.toml, fill weather API key and optionally override binary_dir.
notes: Git-tracked template (no secrets). Contains setup instructions (5-step initial, 2-step cross-machine). Placeholder key value is the literal string YOUR_OPENWEATHERMAP_API_KEY. binary_dir defaults to ~/.claude/statusline.

name: config.local.toml
purpose: Machine-local config holding live OpenWeatherMap API key and any machine-specific path overrides — gitignored, not read by this agent.
notes: GITIGNORED. Contains secret (weather_api_key). File confirmed present on disk (109 bytes) but not read. Must be recreated on each machine from config.local.toml.example. Should NEVER be synced or committed.

name: tool:statusline
purpose: Go binary that reads Claude Code's statusline JSON from stdin and renders a 16-widget, 3-line ANSI statusline showing model, git branch, context window, rate limits, weather, PR/CI status, current task, and session metrics.
notes: JASON-OS-native binary (not shared with SoNash — sibling relationship). Compiled per platform; binary gitignored (jason-statusline-v2.exe pattern). Cache dir is ~/.claude/statusline/cache-jason-os/ — deliberately isolated from any SoNash statusline cache. config.toml (shared) + config.local.toml (gitignored secret) two-file merge pattern. Install target: ~/.claude/statusline/. Rebuild trigger: 'bash tools/statusline/build.sh'. 12 source/config files tracked in git; 2 files gitignored (binary + local config). Size_bytes is sum of all tracked files.
